raw_payload.subject: Checking on the CEPA owner planning conversation
raw_payload.thread_summary: We sent Priya a note 12 days ago after she mentioned several owner-clients were beginning succession and exit planning conversations. No reply since.
raw_payload.last_outbound_excerpt: Hi Priya - you mentioned a few owner-clients beginning succession and exit planning work. IFG has been seeing useful buyer behavior across founder-owned services businesses, and I thought a short market read might be helpful as you advise them. Would it be useful to compare notes next week? - Sam
